cities.name: Tbilisi
cities.notes: Old Town sulfur baths, Narikala fortress, natural wine and bridge of peace

cities.name: Batumi
cities.notes: Black Sea promenade, Alphabet Tower, botanical garden and beach clubs

cities.name: Kazbegi
cities.notes: Dramatic Gergeti Trinity Church above clouds with Caucasus peak backdrop

cities.name: Kutaisi
cities.notes: Gelati monastery UNESCO site, Prometheus stalactite cave and Okatse canyon

cities.name: Sighnaghi
cities.notes: Walled town in Kakheti wine country with Alazani Valley views
